task_completion.description: Configure barcode types in bcWebCam.ini to enable only DataMatrix.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for bcWebCam.ini open in an editor or modified via script. Under [BarcodeD], Type should be a nonzero value (e.g., 1). Under [BarcodeL] and [BarcodeP], Type should be 0. [BarcodeA] and [BarcodePN] should also be 0.

task_completion.description: Configure clinical parameters in bcWebCam.ini (beep, postfix, grace period, opacity).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for bcWebCam.ini open in an editor or modified via script. The following values must be set: Beep=False, SendKeysPostfix= (left empty after the equals sign), BcGracePeriod=5, and Opacity=0,65 (must use a comma, not a period).

task_completion.description: Open and analyze the scan log and approved medications database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for scan_log.txt and approved_medications.csv open in a text editor, spreadsheet application, or terminal output, indicating the agent is reviewing the data to classify the barcodes.

task_completion.description: Create the audit_report.csv with the correct headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for audit_report.csv being created or edited. It must contain the exact headers: Timestamp, RawData, BarcodeType, GTIN, ProductName, Action.

task_completion.description: Correctly classify the 10 scan log entries in the audit report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the data rows in audit_report.csv. The 'Action' column for the 10 rows should match the sequence: ACCEPT, REJECT, ACCEPT, REJECT, ACCEPT, REJECT, INVESTIGATE, INVESTIGATE, REJECT, ACCEPT. The 'BarcodeType' should correctly identify DATAMATRIX, EAN13, and QR_URL.

integrity.description: Ensure bcWebCam application is closed before editing its INI file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The bcWebCam application window or system tray icon should not be actively running/visible while the agent is modifying bcWebCam.ini.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually saved the changes to the INI and CSV files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for file save actions in the editor (e.g., Ctrl+S, asterisk disappearing from filename tab) or terminal commands confirming the files were written to disk, rather than just printing the answers to the console.

integrity.description: Ensure the audit report uses the actual data from scan_log.txt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The timestamps and raw data in audit_report.csv must match the entries seen in scan_log.txt, rather than being made up or copied from a generic example.

privileged_info_for_vlm: INI Path: C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Local\bcWebCam\bcWebCam.ini. Expected INI values: [BarcodeD] Type > 0, [BarcodeL] Type=0, [BarcodeP] Type=0, [BarcodeA] Type=0, [BarcodePN] Type=0, Beep=False, BcGracePeriod=5, SendKeysPostfix= (empty), Opacity=0,65 (MUST use comma). Audit Report Path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\ScanStation\audit_report.csv. The report must have 10 rows. Expected Actions (Rows 1-10): ACCEPT, REJECT, ACCEPT, REJECT, ACCEPT, REJECT, INVESTIGATE, INVESTIGATE, REJECT, ACCEPT. Expected Barcode Types: DATAMATRIX, EAN13, DATAMATRIX, QR_URL, DATAMATRIX, EAN13, DATAMATRIX, DATAMATRIX, EAN13, DATAMATRIX. Expected GTINs for DataMatrix rows: 00300010633215, 00357111370104, 00363391312393, 00312547698521 (Expired), 00398765432109 (Unknown), 00346587231092.
